mapper.select: select ur.name from iam_user_role_rel uurr inner join iam_role ur on uurr.role_id = ur.id where uurr.user_id = #{userId} and ur.status = 1 and ur.is_deleted = 0
select ur.id from iam_user_group_role_rel uurr inner join iam_role ur on uurr.role_id = ur.id where uurr.user_group_id = #{userGroupId} and ur.status = 1 and ur.is_deleted = 0
select ur.name from iam_user_group_role_rel uurr inner join iam_role ur on uurr.role_id = ur.id where uurr.user_group_id = #{userGroupId} and ur.status = 1 and ur.is_deleted = 0
